sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Hephaestio</hi> Grammaticus [Heph.] <title_ TEIform="title">Hephaestionis Enchiridion cum commentariis veteribus,</title_> ed. M. Consbruch, Leipzig (T.) 1906; cited without title. <title_ TEIform="title">Poëm.</title_> = <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περὶ ποιημάτων,</foreign> ed. M. Consbruch, ibid. p. 62. Scholia, ibid. p. 79; ed. R. Westphal, <title_ TEIform="title">Scriptores Metrici Graeci</title_> i p. 95, Leipzig (T.) 1866.</item>
